job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst III (Remote Capable)
Company: Geisinger
Source: LinkedIn
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/healthcare-data-analyst-iii-remote-capable-at-geisinger-4397577349

- Healthcare analytics role supporting research and high-quality data products.
- Emphasizes programming, validation, interpretation, and collaboration.
strengths: Healthcare data and quality support overlap

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Data Validation | Analytics Delivery
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering high-quality enterprise data across healthcare and other regulated domains. Strong background in advanced SQL, source-to-target testing, defect reduction, and collaboration with business and technical stakeholders to ensure trusted analytical outputs.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, validation strategy, root-cause analysis, defect triage
replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage

replacements.replace: Authored 200+ advanced SQL queries for source-to-target reconciliation across 100M+ claim and member records, supporting delivery of reliable analytical outputs across major releases.
replacements.find: Authored 200+ advanced SQL queries (multi-table joins, window functions, CTEs) for source-to-target reconciliation across 100M+ claim and member records, reducing release-blocking defects by ~30% across major releases.

replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules to improve consistency, quality, and analyst productivity.
replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.

gaps: Posting leans research and programming more heavily
Mentoring/code review emphasis is stronger than current resume
notes: Weaker but relevant. Tailored toward analytic rigor, validation, and delivery of high-quality data products.
